test_group_ohlc
    Check a group transform that executes a cumulative function.
    Parameters
    ----------
    pd_op : callable
        The pandas cumulative function.
    np_op : callable
        The analogous one in NumPy.
    dtype : type
        The specified dtype of the data.
    Fr
